matrix_description: Minimal local E2E smoke matrix (1 cell × 1 trial). Used by scripts/local_e2e_smoke_test.sh to verify the full toolchain (sweep → aggregate → digest) end-to-end on a developer laptop in under a minute. NOT for paper-grade measurement — use matrix_v1.json for that.

cells.description: BASELINE smoke cell — uses the same scenario as matrix_v1.json's BASELINE row but with trials_per_cell=1 so the smoke test finishes in seconds, not minutes.

anchor_commits._purpose: Filled in by the orchestrator at sweep start so the resulting digest is reproducible.
